title: Search and return match data from all provided CSV files
evidence: loader.go loads Brasileirao_Matches.csv, Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv, Libertadores_Matches.csv, BR-Football-Dataset.csv, novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv; query.go:FindMatches filters across all; tests verify each file loads correctly

title: Search and return player data
evidence: loader.go:loadPlayers reads fifa_data.csv (18,207 players); query.go:SearchPlayers filters by name/club/nationality; tools.go:search_players tool exposed; tests: TestTool_SearchPlayers, TestScenario_FindBrazilianPlayers pass

title: Calculate basic statistics (wins, losses, goals)
evidence: query.go has TeamStats, CompetitionStats; tools.go:team_stats calculates wins/draws/losses/goals; test TestScenario_GetTeamStatistics verifies output; TestScenario_CompetitionStatistics verifies league-level math

title: Compare teams head-to-head
evidence: query.go:HeadToHead function; tools.go:head_to_head tool; test TestScenario_HeadToHeadRecord verifies win/draw/loss counts between Flamengo and Fluminense

title: Handles team name variations correctly
evidence: normalize.go:NormalizeTeamKey strips state suffix (Palmeiras-SP → palmeiras), folds accents (São Paulo → sao paulo), collapses whitespace; test TestNormalizeTeamKey covers 8 edge cases; test TestKeyContainsHandlesVariations verifies matching

title: Returns properly formatted responses
evidence: tools.go:describeMatch formats matches as 'date: home score away (competition)'; TeamStats output formatted with win percentages (pct function); all tool handlers return human-readable strings

title: Simple lookups respond in < 2 seconds
evidence: test TestScenario_FindMatchesBetweenTwoTeams completes in 0.01s; test TestTool_SearchMatches completes in 0.02s; simple queries are O(n) over in-memory store with ~4k matches
suggestion: Confirmed by test timing but not load-tested under high concurrency

title: Aggregate queries respond in < 5 seconds
evidence: test TestScenario_CompetitionStatistics completes in 0.02s; test TestScenario_LeagueStandings completes in 0.01s; TestTool_CompetitionStats completes in 0.02s
suggestion: Confirmed by test timing but not load-tested; assumes in-memory performance scales to multi-million record datasets

title: All 6 CSV files are loadable and queryable
evidence: test TestRawDatasetCounts verifies all 6 files load: Brasileirao_Matches.csv (4,180), Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv (1,337), Libertadores_Matches.csv (1,255), BR-Football-Dataset.csv (10,296), novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv (6,886), fifa_data.csv (18,207)

title: At least 20 sample questions can be answered
evidence: 12 BDD scenario tests cover: Find matches between teams, search by competition/season, team statistics, home record, head-to-head, league standings, find Brazilian players, search by name, filter by club, filter by rating. Plus 12 tool integration tests (7 tools × variations). Total 24 tested scenarios

title: Cross-file queries work (e.g., player + match data)
evidence: tools.go exposes both search_players (team data from FIFA) and search_matches separately; client can chain queries; test TestScenario_FilterPlayersByClub filters FIFA data by club name which appears in match data
suggestion: Note: cross-file correlation (e.g., 'show all players who won matches') not explicitly exercised in tests

title: Match Queries by team, date range, competition, season
evidence: query.go:MatchFilter has Team, Opponent, Competition, Season, DateFrom, DateTo; test TestScenario_FindMatchesByCompetitionAndSeason; tool search_matches accepts all parameters

title: Team Queries: statistics, records, head-to-head
evidence: query.go:TeamStats computes matches/wins/draws/losses/goalsFor/goalsAgainst; HeadToHead calculates specific fixture records; test TestScenario_TeamHomeRecord filters by venue (home/away)

title: Player Queries: search by name, club, nationality
evidence: query.go:PlayerFilter has Name, Nationality, Club, MinRating; test TestScenario_SearchPlayerByName, FilterPlayersByClub, FilterPlayersByMinimumRating, FindBrazilianPlayers all pass

title: Competition Queries: standings, statistics
evidence: query.go:CompetitionStandings calculates league table from matches; CompetitionStats aggregates across competition; tools.go:competition_standings and competition_stats; tests TestScenario_LeagueStandings, CompetitionStatistics pass

title: Statistical Analysis: aggregations, goals per match, records
evidence: query.go calculates: Goal margin (GoalMargin method), head-to-head records, league standings with points, home/away splits; no explicit 'biggest wins' ranking but data available for client to sort
suggestion: Could add a tool to list biggest victories by goal margin

title: Data Quality: handles team name variations
evidence: normalize.go:NormalizeTeamKey; 8 test cases covering state suffix, accents, parentheticals; test TestKeyContainsHandlesVariations verifies Flamengo, flamengo, Flamengo-RJ all match

title: Data Quality: handles multiple date formats
evidence: loader.go:dateLayouts supports ISO (2006-01-02), ISO with time, Brazilian (02/01/2006), US (01/02/2006); test TestDateFormatParsing verifies all formats parse correctly

title: Data Quality: handles UTF-8 encoding and special characters
evidence: loader.go strips UTF-8 BOM (\ufeff); normalize.go:stripAccents uses unidecode to fold São Paulo → sao paulo, Grêmio → gremio; test TestStripAccents covers accented characters

title: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server correctly implemented
evidence: mcp.go implements Server struct with Serve method; handles initialize, tools/list, tools/call methods; tests TestMCP_Initialize, ToolsList, ToolCall, error handling all pass; 8 protocol tests cover happy path and error cases

title: Build and lint status
evidence: go build ./... completes with no errors; go vet ./... produces no warnings
